ANET.name: Arista Networks
ANET.reasoning: Perfect bottleneck play - AMZN is strong in our portfolio and ANET supplies it directly via data center networking. Golden Cross active + above 200MA + institutions loading. This is classic derived demand catching up.

CDNS.name: Cadence Design Systems (EDA)
CDNS.reasoning: EDA monopoly with literal pricing power - every chip starts as software design. Golden Cross + above 200MA + uptrend intact. This is the ultimate bottleneck as AI chip demand explodes.

MRVL.name: Marvell Technology
MRVL.reasoning: Perfect bottleneck play with BREAKOUT confirmation on volume - this is institutional buying. MRVL supplies custom chips for AI data centers while NVDA/AMD already ran. Golden Cross + above 200MA creates low-risk entry on momentum continuation.

LRCX.name: Lam Research
LRCX.reasoning: Semiconductor equipment bottleneck testing resistance at $345 - every AI chip needs LRCX etching tools. Golden Cross active with A/D rising shows institutions accumulating. Testing breakout while semis are strong creates perfect derived demand setup.

KLAC.name: KLA Corporation
KLAC.reasoning: Metrology equipment monopoly testing $2103 resistance with Golden Cross + institutional accumulation. KLAC inspects every chip in production - pure bottleneck play as AI chip demand explodes. Higher highs/lows pattern intact with strong momentum.

AMAT.name: Applied Materials
AMAT.reasoning: Perfect redemption play - previously lost on AMAT by buying at resistance, now it's showing clear breakout with AMD strength driving derived demand. Golden Cross + above 200MA + institutional accumulation. This is the bottleneck play as AMD runs.

ASML.name: ASML Holding
ASML.reasoning: Ultimate semiconductor bottleneck - every advanced chip requires ASML's EUV lithography machines. Golden Cross + above 200MA + institutional buying. This is the monopoly supplier to NVDA/AMD/TSM supply chain.

MU.name: Micron Technology
MU.reasoning: Perfect derived demand play - MU is the primary memory supplier and is showing institutional accumulation with Golden Cross active. LRCX and KLAC in our portfolio supply MU directly, creating a supply chain momentum play. Strong breakout setup.
